query: SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.vehicle_make, c.vehicle_model, aa.total_loss_indicated, aa.estimated_vehicle_value, aa.estimated_cost, aa.repair_to_value_ratio, aa.structural_damage_severity FROM claims c LEFT JOIN ai_assessments aa ON aa.claim_id = c.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.vehicle_make, c.vehicle_model, aa.total_loss_indicated, aa.estimated_vehicle_value, aa.estimated_cost, aa.repair_to_value_ratio, aa.structural_damage_severity FROM claims c LEFT JOIN ai_assessments aa ON aa.claim_id = c.id;
